summary: Tested username-related features for Addrika e-commerce platform. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI properly implements username field with case-sensitive indicator, real-time availability check, and blocked username validation. Forgot Username page is functional. Admin registration logs endpoints exist and require authentication.

Username Availability Check API.details: Returns available=true/false with proper validation errors for short usernames, invalid characters, and usernames starting with numbers

Blocked Username Validation.details: All blocked usernames return 'This username is not available' error. Case-insensitive blocking works (sanman, SANMAN also blocked)

Forgot Username API.details: Returns 404 for non-existent phone, 400 for empty phone. Returns masked email on success.

Login with Username.details: Login endpoint accepts 'identifier' field for both email and username login

Registration with Username.details: Registration validates username and rejects blocked usernames

Admin Registration Logs.details: Endpoint exists and requires authentication. Returns logs with unread_count.

Admin Notifications Count.details: Endpoint exists and requires authentication. Returns unread_registrations count.

Login Page UI.details: Shows 'Email or Username *' label with 'Enter email or username' placeholder. Both 'Forgot Username?' and 'Forgot Password?' links visible.

Forgot Username Page UI.details: Page accessible at /forgot-username. Shows phone input with country code selector, 'Send Username' button, and proper messaging.

Register Page Username Field.details: Username field shows '(case-sensitive)' indicator. Real-time availability check shows green checkmark for available usernames, red X with error for blocked/unavailable usernames.

PackagingSection AI Image.details: Premium & Eco-Conscious section displays AI-generated amber glass Bakhoor jar image with ADDRIKA branding

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Username stored case-sensitive for display with username_lower field for lookups
✓ Login endpoint uses username_lower for case-insensitive username login
✓ Forgot username endpoint properly masks email (first 3 chars + *** + domain)
✓ Registration logs created on successful registration with read_by_admin flag
✓ Real-time username availability check with debounce implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Username features fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs for username check, forgot username, and admin registration logs all working. Frontend properly shows username field with case-sensitive indicator and real-time validation. Admin endpoints require 2FA authentication - master password only works for PIN recovery, not regular login.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
